headline: Hitachi Solutions Appoints Roger Lvin as Chief Executive Officer and President
summary: Hitachi Solutions today announced the appointment of Roger Lvin as Chief Executive Officer and President, effective immediately.

headline: Cognizant Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: Cognizant (Nasdaq: CTSH), a leading AI builder and technology services provider, will announce results for the first quarter of 2026 on Wednesday, April 29, 2026 before market open.
